name: Cerberus
desc: Three-headed dogs that guard the portals to the underworld

name: Leviathan
desc: Colossal sea beasts with rows of chitinous plates, eyes like moons, and mouths large enough to swallow a ship

name: Fae
desc: Innately capricious entities that look like perfect versions of their mortal counterparts

name: Gorgon
desc: Snakelike-haired horrors who turn intruders to stone with their piercing gaze

name: Korrakloth
desc: Fluffy, comically strong creatures that sprint across mountainsides like thunder

name: Linh Dai
desc: Ethereal spirits of rivers and lakes, that grant boons to fishermen and curse those who pollute

name: Halfling
desc: Small, round humanoids, beloved for their food, drink, and ability to land their cursed horseshoes inside buildings
